description: Create or update a file in a GitHub repository

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

path.description: The file path in the repository.

content.description: The new file content, Base64 encoded.

sha.description: The blob SHA of the file being replaced. Required when updating a file.

branch.description: The branch name. Uses the repository's default branch if not specified.

committer.description: The person that committed the file.

name.description: The name of the author or committer of the commit.

email.description: The email of the author or committer of the commit.

date.description: Indicates when this commit was authored or committed in ISO 8601 format.
Indicates when this commit was authored in ISO 8601 format.
